  "findings": [
    "Windshield replaced but ADAS camera not recalibrated per OEM requirements",
    "Forward-facing camera system operating with unknown alignment — safety-critical ADAS functions unverified",
    "Post-repair calibration omitted after component replacement that directly affects camera mounting reference"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not return vehicle to customer until camera calibration is completed",
    "Perform OEM-specified static and/or dynamic ADAS calibration procedure using approved target and scan tool",
    "Verify calibration results and document before closing work order",
    "Road-test or system verification per OEM procedure after calibration"
  ],
  "rationale": "OEM position statements universally require ADAS camera calibration after windshield replacement. The camera mounts to the windshield, and any replacement disturbs the optical alignment reference. Operating the vehicle without calibration leaves lane-keeping, automatic emergency braking, and other safety systems in an unverified state, creating critical safety risk.",
  "references": [
    "OEM position statements on ADAS calibration after windshield replacement",
    "Manufacturer service information requiring post-repair calibration when camera-mounted components are disturbed"
  ]
}
